mapper.select: select jobid, version, stepid, stepname, steptype, stepseq, db, status, phase, threadcnt, commitcnt, to_char(enddate,'yyyy/mm/dd') as enddate, to_char(regdate,'yyyy/mm/dd') as regdate, to_char(upddate,'yyyy/mm/dd') as upddate, reguserid, upduserid from cotdl.tbl_piistep a where version in (select max(to_number(version)) from cotdl.tbl_piistep where jobid = a.jobid and stepid = a.stepid ) order by jobid, stepseq
mapper.insert: insert into cotdl.tbl_piistep (jobid, version, stepid, stepname, steptype, stepseq, db, status, phase, threadcnt, commitcnt, enddate, regdate, upddate, reguserid, upduserid) values (#{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stepid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stepname, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{steptype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, (select COALESCE(max(stepseq),0)+1 from cotdl.tbl_piistep where jobid= #{jobid} ), #{db, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{phase, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{threadcnt, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{commitcnt, jdbcType=INTEGER}, to_date(#{enddate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'yyyy/mm/dd'), SYSDATE, SYSDATE, #{reguserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{upduserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update: update cotdl.tbl_piistep set phase= 'APPROVING', upddate= SYSDATE where jobid= #{jobid} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
update cotdl.tbl_piistep set phase= 'CHECKOUT', upddate= SYSDATE where jobid= #{id} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
update cotdl.tbl_piistep set phase= 'CHECKIN', upddate= SYSDATE where jobid= #{id} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert: insert into cotdl.tbl_piistep (jobid, version, stepid, stepname, steptype, stepseq, db, status, phase, threadcnt, commitcnt, enddate, regdate, upddate, reguserid, upduserid) values (#{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stepid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stepname, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{steptype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, (select COALESCE(max(stepseq),0)+1 from cotdl.tbl_piistep where jobid= #{jobid} ), #{db, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{phase, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{threadcnt, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{commitcnt, jdbcType=INTEGER}, to_date(#{enddate, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'yyyy/mm/dd'), SYSDATE, SYSDATE, #{reguserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{upduserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select: select jobid, version, stepid, stepname, steptype, stepseq, db, status, phase, threadcnt, commitcnt, to_char(enddate,'yyyy/mm/dd') as enddate, to_char(regdate,'yyyy/mm/dd') as regdate, to_char(upddate,'yyyy/mm/dd') as upddate, reguserid, upduserid from cotdl.tbl_piistep where jobid= #{jobid} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and stepid= #{stepid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

select jobid, version, stepid, stepname, steptype, stepseq, db, status, phase, threadcnt, commitcnt, to_char(enddate,'yyyy/mm/dd') as enddate, to_char(regdate,'yyyy/mm/dd') as regdate, to_char(upddate,'yyyy/mm/dd') as upddate, reguserid, upduserid from cotdl.tbl_piistep where jobid= #{jobid} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and steptype= #{steptype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

select jobid, version, stepid, stepname, steptype, stepseq, db, status, phase, threadcnt, commitcnt, to_char(enddate,'yyyy/mm/dd') as enddate, to_char(regdate,'yyyy/mm/dd') as regdate, to_char(upddate,'yyyy/mm/dd') as upddate, reguserid, upduserid from cotdl.tbl_piistep where jobid= #{jobid} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and steptype in ('EXE_DELETE', 'EXE_UPDATE')
select count(1) from cotdl.tbl_piistep where jobid= #{jobid} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and steptype= #{steptype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.delete: delete from cotdl.tbl_piistep where jobid= #{jobid} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and stepid= #{stepid}
delete from cotdl.tbl_piistep where jobid= #{jobid} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.update: update cotdl.tbl_piistep set stepname= #{stepname, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, steptype= #{steptype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, stepseq= #{stepseq, jdbcType=INTEGER}, db= #{db, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status= #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, phase= #{phase, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, threadcnt= #{threadcnt, jdbcType=INTEGER}, commitcnt= #{commitcnt, jdbcType=INTEGER}, version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enddate= to_date(#{enddate}, 'yyyy/mm/dd'), regdate= to_date(#{regdate}, 'yyyy/mm/dd'), upddate= SYSDATE, reguserid= #{reguserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, upduserid= #{upduserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} where jobid= #{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and stepid= #{stepid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update cotdl.tbl_piistep set status= #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR} where (jobid, version) in (select jobid, max(to_number(version)) version from cotdl.tbl_piijob where policy_id= #{policy_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and status='ACTIVE' group by jobid) and steptype= 'EXE_ARCHIVE'
mapper.select: select count(1) from cotdl.tbl_piistep a where
